2605.18184.title: Fixed External Cameras as Common Prior Maps for Active 3D Scene Graph Generation
2605.18184.paper_summary: Commonly available prior information, such as BIM models, floor plans, and remote sensing images, can provide valuable geometric and semantic context for autonomous robotic systems. In this paper, we treat observations from fixed external RGB cameras as Common Prior Maps (CPMs): wide-field views of the environment that initialize a semantic and geometric scene prior before any robot motion begins. We present an RGB-only framework for active, incremental 3D scene graph (3DSG) generation that seamlessly fuses observations from both onboard robot cameras and fixed external cameras within a single hardware-agnostic pipeline. By relying solely on RGB observations processed by a feed-forward 3D reconstruction model, the system treats all cameras - onboard or external - identically, requiring no hardware modifications. A graph-based active semantic exploration framework then directly leverages the partial scene graph to guide the robot toward regions of high semantic uncertainty, progressively completing and refining the prior. Experiments demonstrate that bootstrapping the scene graph with even a single external camera increases initial object recall by up to +79%, and that the richer context of the prior significantly improves the efficiency of subsequent active exploration.
2605.18184.paper_summary_zh: 常見的可用先前資訊，例如BIM模型、平面圖和遙感影像，可以為自主機器人系統提供有價值的幾何和語義背景。<lb/>在本文中，我們將來自固定外部RGB相機的觀測視為共通先前地圖（CPMs）：環境的廣角視圖，在任何機器人運動開始之前初始化語義和幾何場景的先驗。<lb/>我們提出了一個僅基於RGB的框架，用於主動的增量3D場景圖（3DSG）生成，該框架在單一的硬體無關管道中無縫融合來自機器人機載相機和固定外部相機的觀測。<lb/>通過僅依賴由前饋3D重建模型處理的RGB觀測，系統將所有相機（無論是機載還是外部）視為相同，無需硬體修改。<lb/>基於圖形的主動語義探索框架隨後直接利用部分場景圖，引導機器人朝向高語義不確定性的區域，逐步完成和精煉先驗。<lb/>實驗表明，即使用一個外部相機啟動場景圖，也能將初始物體召回率提高多達79%，而且先驗的豐富背景顯著提高了隨後主動探索的效率。
2605.18184.author: Giorgia Modi et.al.
2605.18184.authors: Giorgia Modi, Davide Buoso, Giuseppe Averta, Daniele De Martini
